author: misilva73
content:
A quick update on EIP-7904. Now that benchmarking results have stabilized, I have updated the EIP to be informational and to clarify that there is no need to increase gas costs for compute operations. The PR is still in draft : https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11622)

I plan to merge this by EOW. Let me know if there are any concerns or suggestions
